claims.subject: tap-loyalty bug
claims.evidence: their reconciliation reports were showing mismatches between tap transactions and loyalty point accrual which meant their finance team couldn't close the books cleanly at month-end
claims.object_value: reconciliation mismatches between tap transactions and loyalty point accrual

claims.subject: tap-loyalty bug
claims.evidence: ahmad rashid's team — they own the mobile side which is where the bug actually is
claims.object_value: mobile side (owned by Ahmad Rashid's team)

claims.subject: tap-loyalty bug workaround
claims.evidence: ahmad's team generates a manual reconciliation report for them once a month, separately, that ties out the numbers. we send it to the merchant's finance lead.
claims.object_value: Ahmad Rashid's team generates a manual monthly reconciliation report sent to merchant's finance lead
